metadata.description: SEO + GEO skills for Claude Code by Zara Hunter (Eduk8agentic) — rank in classic search and get cited by AI answer engines, with a dedicated Arabic / MENA playbook.

plugins.name: seo-geo
plugins.description: Two skills that work together for full page optimization. on-page-seo: rank in classic Google / Bing (search intent, keyword placement, title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, internal links, alt text). ai-seo (GEO): get retrieved and cited inside AI answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews, Gemini, Copilot, Claude) — audits, AI-first content, entity presence, monitoring, hard cases, and a dedicated MENA / Arabic playbook.
